bugs.title: WeaponLootRegistrar.kt: invalid Stonecutter 0.6 syntax on MOD_VERSION_STRING causes chiseledBuild to fail on all 5 MC versions
bugs.expected: Stonecutter 0.6 parses MOD_VERSION_STRING fork correctly so chiseledBuild succeeds on all 5 versions (1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2). This was the acceptance criterion for wave-3-agent-2: 'File compiles on all 5 MC versions with chiseledBuild'.

bugs.title: chiseledTest and chiseledRunGametest not run: Phase 5 test results entirely unverified across all 5 MC versions
bugs.evidence:
| 1.20.1  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 1.21.1  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 1.21.4  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 1.21.11 | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 26.1.2  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
bugs.expected: Verification matrix must show GREEN for all 5 MC versions across chiseledBuild, chiseledTest, and chiseledRunGametest. The WeaponLootRegistrar.kt parse error prevents any of this from being verified. Status is HOLD, not GREEN.
bugs.suggested_fix: Fix the Stonecutter syntax in WeaponLootRegistrar.kt (see bug-1), then re-run ./gradlew chiseledBuild && ./gradlew chiseledTest && ./gradlew chiseledRunGametest and update the verification doc with actual pass/fail results before promoting to GREEN status or applying the phase-5-acquisition git tag.
